moduleDescription: This module implements a base object of a lexer with efficient buffer handling. Only at line endings checks are necessary if the buffer needs refilling.

entries.name: BaseLexer
entries.code:
BaseLexer = object of RootObj
  bufpos*: int               ## the current position within the buffer
  buf*: string               ## the buffer itself
  lineNumber*: int           ## the current line number
  offsetBase*: int
entries.description: the base lexer. Inherit your lexer from this object.

entries.name: close
entries.code:
proc close(L: var BaseLexer) {.raises: [IOError, OSError],
                               tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: closes the base lexer. This closes L's associated stream too.

entries.name: handleCR
entries.code:
proc handleCR(L: var BaseLexer; pos: int): int {.raises: [IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Call this if you scanned over '\c' in the buffer; it returns the position to continue the scanning from. pos must be the position of the '\c'.

entries.name: handleLF
entries.code:
proc handleLF(L: var BaseLexer; pos: int): int {.raises: [IOError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Call this if you scanned over '\L' in the buffer; it returns the position to continue the scanning from. pos must be the position of the '\L'.

entries.name: handleRefillChar
entries.code:
proc handleRefillChar(L: var BaseLexer; pos: int): int {.
    raises: [IOError, OSError], tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Call this if a terminator character other than a new line is scanned at pos; it returns the position to continue the scanning from.

entries.name: open
entries.description: inits the BaseLexer with a stream to read from.

entries.name: getColNumber
entries.code:
proc getColNumber(L: BaseLexer; pos: int): int {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

entries.name: getCurrentLine
entries.code:
proc getCurrentLine(L: BaseLexer; marker: bool = true): string {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
